NAME: Yang Lab xQTL
DESCRIPTION: Yang lab SMR/xQTL data resource — public GWAS and molecular QTL summary statistics for integrative analysis.
TITLE: SMR-Portal: an online platform for integrative analysis of GWAS and xQTL data to identify complex trait genes.
Authors: Guo Y,Xu T,Luo J,Jiang Z,Chen W,Chen H,Qi T,Yang J
CITATION: Guo Y, Xu T, Luo J, Jiang Z, ...&, Yang J. (2025) SMR-Portal: an online platform for integrative analysis of GWAS and xQTL data to identify complex trait genes. Nat Methods, 22 (2) 220-222. doi:10.1038/s41592-024-02561-7. PMID 39623049
